data.title: Vitalik Buterin Publishes Roadmap to Improve Ethereum’s User Privacy
data.description:
TL;DR Vitalik Buterin has unveiled a roadmap focused on enhancing privacy on Ethereum’s layer 1 without modifying its consensus mechanism, paving a realistic path toward a more confidential network. The document outlines nine key proposals, such as integrating tools like Railgun directly into wallets, promoting one address per application, and leveraging technologies like PIR and. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/vitalik-buterin-publishes-roadmap-to-improve-ethereums-user-privacy/

data.title: U.S. March PPI Shows Signs of Cooling Amid Commodity Price Drops
data.description: According to PANews, financial website Forexlive analyst Adam Button commented on the U.S. March Producer Price Index (PPI), stating that the data indicates a welcome cooling trend, suggesting some anti-inflationary pressures are developing. He noted that with the recent declines in oil and commodity prices, further cooling is expected. Energy prices fell by 4.0%, food prices decreased by 2.1%, and gasoline prices dropped by 11.1%, accounting for two-thirds of the decline in goods prices.

data.title: U.S. Pension Funds Face Significant Losses Following Tariff Announcement
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump's recent announcement of global tariffs has led to substantial financial losses for major pension funds. A report by the New York-based bipartisan nonprofit Equable Institute reveals that the top 25 state and local pension investment funds in the United States experienced approximately $169 billion in paper losses in public stocks over four trading days from April 3 to April 8. The report further indicates that these leading funds have incurred around $249 billion in losses so far this year. The organization warns that the total losses across the entire U.S. public retirement system could be significantly higher.

data.title: A whale bought 3,316 ETH at an average price of $1,548, worth $5.13 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain data analyst ai_9684xtpa, a giant whale spent $5.13 million to buy 3,316 ETH on the chain at an average price of $1,548 three hours ago. According to the whale's previous transaction records, it seems to be for the band ETH. The whale has accumulated a loss of $380,000 by buying high and selling low ETH in the past month.

data.title: The annual rate of PPI in March was 2.7%, expected to be 3.3%, and the previous value was 3.20%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The annual rate of PPI in the United States in March was 2.7%, which was expected to be 3.3% and the previous value was 3.20%. The monthly rate of PPI in the United States in March was -0.4%, the largest drop since October 2023. (Jinshi)

data.title: HTX DAO's first two HIP governance proposals have been put to vote
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the first two HIP (HTX Improvement Proposal) formal governance proposals of HTX DAO have been put up for voting, namely "HTX DAO Committee Governance Mechanism Setting Proposal" and "Proposal on the establishment of HTX DAO official interview column "DAO Friends Please Stay"". All community users can obtain corresponding voting rights according to the HTX holdings in their TRON LINK wallet addresses, and vote on the proposals on the HTX DAO official website. Voting will end at 0:00 (UTC+8) on April 15.
HTX DAO officially launched the HTX holding voting tool on April 7, aiming to fully open up HTX governance rights and interests and continue to expand the decentralized governance system. According to the HTX DAO governance roadmap, the platform plans to combine handling fee rebates, governance incentives, etc. in the future to launch a series of "voting is income" incentives to encourage community members to actively participate in the decentralized governance process.

data.title: BugsCoin Completes $12 Million Series A Funding, Becker Ventures and Others Participate
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 decentralized financial education platform BugsCoin (BGSC) announced the completion of a $12 million Series A strategic financing, which was jointly invested by Becker Ventures, Castrum Capital, BullPerks, DuckDAO, Maxx Capital and several Asian family offices.
BugsCoin aims to build a practice-driven financial education ecosystem through a risk-free simulated trading system to achieve dual incentives for learning and benefits. Officials said that the financing will be used for global market expansion, BugsFunded decentralized asset management protocol upgrades, AI smart investment advisor research and development, and BGSC ecosystem construction.
Currently, BugsCoin has been listed on exchanges such as Gate.io, Bitget, HashKey, MEXC, and BitMart, and recently completed the destruction of 50 billion BGSC tokens.

data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fed's Kashkari: No evidence of rising long-term inflation expectations has been seen. (Jinshi)

data.title: An investor who has held AXL for 3 years deposited 5.36 million AXL into Binance, worth $1.65 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to On Chain Lens, an investor who holds AXL has just deposited 5.36 million AXL (worth $1.65 million) into Binance after holding it for 3 years.
